_doc: MECHANICS RECOVERY LOOP tracker. Upgrades non-taunt layers (attacks/maps/loot/stats) from already-prepped frames. Sprites NOT recoverable from video. Regenerate with scripts/mechanics_recovery_ledger.py (preserves verdicts).

bosses.map_notes: Asgard castle boss chamber: large rectangular+arched room, fine small-square grid floor tiles (white/light gray), two tall dark-stone PURPLE PILLAR structures flanking top entry corridor, narrow vertical entry corridor at top center, Asgard Guardian enemies. Dungeon palette olive-green/tan on minimap = dungeon confirmed. Arena SHARED with Loki (same minimap source, same room). DOCUMENTED disc__1He_TVKDuw minimap_00002 + f_00001/f_00005.
bosses.attacks_notes: Bullet shape DOCUMENTED: large blue elongated lance/diamond (disc_9vQughNZIX0 f_00115). Slow debuff observed on player f_00108 (attribution uncertain — Asgard Guardians also shoot nearby). Radial spread: ~3-4 lances visible in 90° arc, total count RECONSTRUCTED (current count:5 shootAngle:18). PARTIAL.

bosses.note: MECH-LOOP 2026-06-24: attacks upgraded no-footage → partial. disc_9vQughNZIX0 f_00220: TRIDENT (proj-0, teal/aqua) bullet CONFIRMED during Loki fight. Loki XML has only proj-0 (Trident); both Shoot() calls fire Trident. count:8/4 + angles RECONSTRUCTED. Taunt correction: 'Now you see me! Now you die!' (was 'Now you don't!' — chat_00056 clearly shows 'die'). New taunt: 'How did you manage to see me?' (VERIFIED-partial chat_00057-58, 1 char truncated). Pending stem 'For my next trick, I will make...' off-screen — NOT injected. Arena: shared Asgard castle boss chamber (same room as Heimdall) — large rectangular+arched room, fine small-square grid floor tiles (white/light gray), two tall dark-stone PURPLE PILLAR structures flanking top entry corridor, narrow vertical corridor entry at top center; olive-green/tan dungeon minimap. DOCUMENTED disc__1He_TVKDuw minimap_00002 + f_00001/f_00005.

Throne Room DOCUMENTED disc_cu6l3YQR608 f_00150(Odin 26%)/f_00160(29%)/f_00170(35%)/f_00180(47%) + minimap_00150. Floor: large alternating gray stone + orange/amber diamond tiles (diagonal checkerboard). Shape: large D-shaped/semicircular chamber with concentric rectangular terrace structure (minimap). Throne Room name verbatim from Odin taunt (intruders in the Throne Room). Two new taunts added: I have awaited you. Prepare to die! + You should be long gone, but you are still here! verified_at 2026-06-14 00:10
bosses.attacks_notes: Bullet shape DOCUMENTED: small rounded/oval ORANGE projectiles (disc_HhwYZGR0M3s f_00145/f_00148/f_00152, Throne Room section). Wide arena distribution consistent with radial-ring spread. Two Shoot() params — count:10 shootAngle:36 (full ring) + count:6 predictive burst — both RECONSTRUCTED counts/angles. verified_at 2026-06-24.

bosses.note: Arena DOCUMENTED disc_-N3MH_woifQ minimap_00080 + f_00500/f_00550/f_00600. Large CIRCULAR golden room: bright yellow/gold stone ring walls, white/cream tile floor with scattered small gold/amber diamond accent tiles, narrow golden corridor entry below. Asgard dungeon exterior = snowy outdoor theme (pine trees, snow). Radial white lightning-bolt burst visible in f_00500 (bossends absent, not used for attack recovery). attacks: no-footage (bossends_tags empty). verified_at 2026-06-14 00:30 PARTIAL 2026-06-24: Thunder Swirl (proj-0, yellow/gold) scatter CONFIRMED disc_9vQughNZIX0 f_00295 (Thor 2% HP). Taunt corrected: "You fight good, mortal, but I am better!" (was "stronger").

Arena DOCUMENTED disc_AUiz1LBnNJg f_00120 + chat_00030. Open FOREST dungeon: large open area, sandy/tan earthy floor with scattered dark olive-green grass patches; many large dead-autumn trees with bright YELLOW/GOLD leaf canopies and brown trunks scattered throughout. Minimap: irregular organic dungeon boundary (tan floor, orange/yellow squares = tree positions). Boss entity: boxy brown/wooden pile (dormant log appearance). Side: Treesmasher taunt stem confirmed again on-screen chat_00030. bossends_tags empty -> attacks no-footage. verified_at 2026-06-14 00:55 PARTIAL: Trident (proj-0, teal) radial spray CONFIRMED disc_AUiz1LBnNJg f_00122; Demon Blade (proj-1, SLOWS) rampage/fall RECONSTRUCTED.

Arena DOCUMENTED GeneralStream minimap_00160 (boss room shape) + minimap_00240 (full dungeon) + f_00210 (floor). Craig Castle dungeon: complex multi-room tan/cream castle with branching corridors. Boss chamber: large rounded-rectangular room with horizontal stripe banding (alternating light/medium tan rows = office carpet tile rows). Floor: warm tan/cream large sandstone tiles with grid seam lines. Narrow top entry corridor. NOTE: footage (disc_3eM07g4Ly5k) shows boss name Craig The Worst Nightmare — possible earlier alias; X3.1.1 client XML = Craig the Mad Intern. bossends empty -> attacks no-footage. verified_at 2026-06-14 01:20 | ATTACK PARTIAL: GeneralStream f_00198/f_00202/f_00205 show orange fire in CROSS pattern (cardinal+diagonal 8-directional star); yellow star secondary bullets. Phase1/2 Shoot params updated from RECONSTRUCTED 5-bullet spread to observed 4x90° cardinal + 4x90° diagonal cross geometry. Cooldowns remain RECONSTRUCTED. Phase3 unchanged.

BASE-GAME non-combat entity. No Shoot() calls — Mysterious Crystal heals itself unless players deal sufficient DPS within 5 seconds. No projectile attacks to document. attacks_status: no-footage -> documented (no attacks by design).

ATTACKS UPGRADED 2026-06-24: small ROUND BLUE/CYAN projectile dots CONFIRMED disc_65DNPf-aCOQ b012_72s_003/b012_72s_010. Large white crystal entity in icy/snowy blue-floor dungeon (Crystal Cavern). Quadforce rotating cross pattern (count:4, shootAngle:90, 8-state rotation) CONSISTENT with observed blue dot distribution. attacks_status: unverifiable-illegible -> partial.

Arena: same Crystal Cavern as Crystal Prisoner — spawned by parent via TossObject range 5-7, StayCloseToSpawn range:5. Crystal Cavern layout DOCUMENTED via Crystal Prisoner (disc_65DNPf-aCOQ mm_00010–mm_00070): dark navy/blue floor, white-outlined rooms, 6-8 rooms branching linear, teal/cyan boss area center-right. Minimap frames from disc_EM9Uba-Nv08/disc_LuUwzl6KwCY unusable (extractor misaligned: EM9Uba all-black, LuUwzl6KwCY captured PROD-STUFF text overlay). Attacks: bossends_tags empty → no-footage. ATTACKS UPGRADED 2026-06-24: small ROUND RED/CRIMSON projectile dots confirmed disc_LuUwzl6KwCY f_00198 (active Clone fight; multiple purple-square Clone entities visible; colored dots scattered outward in directional pattern consistent with bullets, not blood effects). Taunt "I am everywhere and nowhere!" repeated in boss-color f_00195-200. Shoot(10, coolDown:1400) single-aimed bullet; count/coolDown RECONSTRUCTED. attacks_status: no-footage -> partial.

PARTIAL: Demon Blade (proj-0, orange/red) radial spray CONFIRMED disc_AUiz1LBnNJg f_00123/f_00127. Wake taunt "You have awoken the spirit of fire!" VERIFIED f_00125.

bosses.map_notes: Compact Icy Peaks dungeon: narrow tan/brown stone entry corridor → large rectangular boss chamber with light-blue ice-tile floor. Exterior: outdoor snowy biome (dark pine trees). Dungeon minimap (in-game top-right) shows L/T-shaped layout: narrow entry above, wide boss room below. NOTE: the tan/brown floor in f_00100 is the entry corridor (cheese-strategy position), NOT the boss room — the actual boss room floor is light blue ice (confirmed f_00130/f_00140). Ice Queen's Towers are blue ice-cube entities inside boss chamber. DOCUMENTED IcyPeaks f_00130/f_00140 (active Ice Queen fight, light-blue floor visible) + minimap f_00145 (clean minimap: compact 2-room layout).

bosses.note: Arena: Midland dungeon — large circular/octagonal boss chamber; floor: red/crimson large stone tiles with dark grid seam lines; thick dark gray walls. DOCUMENTED-from-frames disc_fjgne_X74s8 f_00190 (fight frame confirming red-tile floor + boss entity) + minimap_00030/00040/00050 (circular chamber shape, dark gray walls). Attacks: bossends_tags empty → no-footage.
bosses.map_notes: Large circular/octagonal boss chamber confirmed from minimap_00030/040/050 (thick dark gray walls, circular room ~8-12 tiles diameter). Floor: red/crimson large stone tiles with dark grid seam lines (f_00190). Dungeon minimap confirmed (distinct room shape, not realm scatter). disc_fjgne_X74s8 chat_00050 shows Dwarf King taunts + Drake Baby death.

bosses.note: Arena: open REALM event — Drake Baby + Horned Drake spawn in open realm; terrain: green grass/trees biome visible in f_02790/02795; in-game realm minimap (amber, scattered dots) confirmed in f_02795; extracted minimap frames all-black (extractor misaligned for this source). Spawn chat 'Drake Baby has just spawned!' confirmed f_02790. Attacks: bossends_tags empty → no-footage. ATTACKS UPGRADED 2026-06-24: small ROUND WHITE projectile dots CONFIRMED disc_kZl_YV0-aVQ f_02806/f_02807. Chat f_02807 "Christie: drake baby has just spawned!" confirms entity. White round dots scattered in realm arena consistent with Shoot(8) single-shot; coolDown:1500 RECONSTRUCTED. attacks_status: no-footage -> partial.
bosses.map_notes: Open realm event confirmed. f_02790: 'Drake Baby has just spawned!' in chat, green grass realm terrain. f_02795: in-game minimap amber/realm with scattered colored dots. Extracted minimap frames disc_kZl_YV0-aVQ unusable (all-black for full 2286-frame set).

bosses.note: NO-FOOTAGE — not found in any recovery spec or frame directory. All attacks and taunts DESIGNED/RECONSTRUCTED. Needs Loop C (media discovery).

Arena: Necropolis dungeon — large square/octagonal boss chamber (chamfered corners); floor: dark gray/black stone tiles; tombstone/grave decoration entities scattered around chamber. DOCUMENTED-from-frames disc_2nyUJDNu9Cs f_00050 (Gravedigger name label + floor + taunts 'Let's see how you handle this.' + 'MINIONS, SAVE ME!!!') + minimap_00020 (square/octagonal chamber, boss red dot + player blue dot) + minimap_00015 (players clustered during fight). Attacks: bossends_tags empty → no-footage. ATTACKS UPGRADED 2026-06-24: crescent/SWOOSH-shaped white projectiles confirmed disc_2nyUJDNu9Cs f_00050 (grayscale frame — shape visible, color unverifiable). Radial spread pattern from boss center. Both P1+P2 taunts visible simultaneously → fight at/below 60% HP (summon state). Count/angle RECONSTRUCTED.
bosses.map_notes: Square/octagonal boss chamber confirmed minimap_00020 (chamfered corners, dark stone walls). Floor: dark gray/black stone tiles confirmed f_00050 (fight frame with 'Gravedigger' entity label above boss). TwilightNecropolis source is a multi-dungeon marathon; disc_2nyUJDNu9Cs is a focused Necropolis run used for primary documentation.

bosses.attacks_notes: PARTIAL disc_MszcvkbWED8 f_00155/f_00160/f_00162 (active Necropolis fight): Diagon entity = large RED SKULL with glowing red eyes (taunt BEHOLD... DIAGON ETERNAL confirmed). Small round RED/CRIMSON bullets visible in dark arena; multi-entity room so coverage may include other Necropolis enemies. Proj-14 red sprite CONFIRMED. Shoot(14,count:6,shootAngle:60) CONSISTENT. Arena: dark charcoal/black stone floor confirmed.
bosses.map_notes: Dark charcoal/black stone dungeon (Necropolis) — confirmed from disc_MszcvkbWED8 f_00155/f_00162 (dark stone tile floor visible during active fight).

Ortar has no minion spawns -> all arena bullets attributable to Ortar. Count/angle RECONSTRUCTED. NEW TAUNT CONFIRMED f_00085: "Me want to go! Me angry!" (already in BehaviorDb as "Me angery!" — actual spelling uncertain at f_ resolution).

PARTIAL disc_XGl3pTaNmTM f_00039/f_00041/f_00043: dense small round ORANGE ring spray; proj-13 CONFIRMED. count:6 RECONSTRUCTED (density suggests may be higher). Arena: green-grass realm with brown/dirt patches.

Grey Missile (proj-1) aimed RECONSTRUCTED. ALSO: disc_VZDxttR2LMk f_00282 (second Legon run, 98.81% HP): white X/cross Thunder Swirl bullets scattered in arena + both taunts in chat + "Ring of the Storm Gods" drop.

MECH-LOOP 2026-06-24: BOSS CHAMBER UPDATED. Attacks: f_00010 chains+nova attribution uncertain (marathon stream).

MECH-LOOP 2026-06-24: attacks upgraded unverifiable-illegible → partial. disc_VZDxttR2LMk f_00210 (~83% HP): dense simultaneous ring of THUNDER SWIRL (proj-0, yellow/gold X-shape) + DEMON BLADE (proj-1, red/orange blade) confirmed in ghost-circle tile arena. Both proj types visible in same frame. count:12/5 + angles RECONSTRUCTED. Boss shows as '????' (name hidden ghost mechanic) during fight. Arena: Elven Forest dungeon — large oval/circular boss arena with organic/jagged boundary; floor: dark green forest tiles with grass/leaf texture; blue water/pond patches visible; large dark tree trunk decorations at edges; dungeon minimap is GREEN/TEAL oval (distinct from stone dungeons). DOCUMENTED-from-frames disc_iBUg7V_Eq0A f_00240 (green floor, tree trunks, water, death-feed 'crushed by Infused Elven King' in chat) + minimap_00025/030 (green oval forest dungeon, organic boundary). Attacks: no-footage (bossends_tags empty). ATTACKS UPGRADED 2026-06-24: green CRESCENT/LEAF-SHAPED projectiles in FULL RING (360 deg) CONFIRMED disc_iBUg7V_Eq0A f_00195/f_00200. ~16-20 evenly-spaced crescent bullets in complete circle around boss in dark green forest arena. Ring pattern INCONSISTENT with current Shoot(14, count:12, shootAngle:30) — ring needs shootAngle:360 + ~16-20 count; ring-geometry re-pass pending. TAUNT CORRECTED: "unlocked, you shall be my first victims." (not "unleashed"). attacks_status: no-footage -> partial.
bosses.map_notes: Green forest dungeon oval arena confirmed minimap_00025/030 (green/teal color, organic boundary ~oval). Floor confirmed f_00240: dark green leaf/grass tiles, water patches, dark tree trunks at edges. minimap_00035 shows red dungeon = player moved to different dungeon after fight.

Bullet shape: elongated teardrop/ice-shard, light blue. Count/angle RECONSTRUCTED. attacks_status: no-footage → partial.
bosses.map_notes: Oval/circular sandy dungeon boss chamber confirmed minimap_00080 (tan/brown color, organic oval shape, scattered orange dots = dungeon enemies). Floor: sandy/tan large square tile pattern (f_00100/00105). Boss fires blue ice projectiles (ice/air element, f_00105). chat_00150 shows 'White Dragon:' text in chat confirming boss.

bosses.note: MECH-LOOP 2026-06-24: attacks upgraded no-footage → partial. disc_XGl3pTaNmTM f_00079: dense WHITE/SILVER ring of GREY MISSILE (proj-0, grey elongated — appears silver/white at video scale) confirmed around boss in open green grass realm. bosses.map_notes: open REALM event — green grass biome, mushrooms + trees; no dungeon. Prepare to die!" — f_00198/f_00200 boss-colored chat. (3) "The gate opens..." — chat_00056 (bossend). (4) "My watch... has... ended..." — chat_00056 death line.
